# AI-smell faux-specific vagueness phrases — single source of truth.
# Checked across the whole document. The check fires when these phrases appear
# WITHOUT a specific number. "Several" is vague; "three" is concrete. The helper
# flags phrases followed by a vague noun rather than a digit.
# Consumed by tests/hooks/artifact-discipline.bats _check_faux_vague.
# Referenced by rules/common/output-discipline-voice.md (row 11).
#
# Pattern: specificity requires commitment; hedging stays safe. The fix is to
# replace with an actual count — or rewrite the sentence to not need one.
several key insights
several important
a number of key
a number of important
multiple important
various aspects
numerous factors
a variety of
a range of different
